user_query: I’m a local tour guide in Torfaen and I want to clean up the on‑page SEO for my small site before the summer season. Please audit the HTML pages in input/site and produce two deliverables: 1) output/seo_audit.md — a concise, reader‑friendly audit report that summarizes what you found and what’s wrong. 2) output/meta_recommendations.csv — structured recommendations for fixing page titles and meta descriptions on pages that need changes. Scope and constraints: - Inspect files and directories under input/site, scanning every .html file you find. - For each page, extract: file_path (relative), text (if any), <meta name="description"> content (if any), first <h1> text, and a count of <img> tags missing an alt attribute. - Identify issues using these rules: • Title length out of range if < 30 or > 65 characters. • Meta description length out of range if < 110 or > 160 characters. • Missing title or missing description if not present. • Duplicates: consider titles identical if their text matches exactly after trimming whitespace and normalizing case; same for descriptions. Flag any page that shares a title or description with another page. - The audit report (output/seo_audit.md) should include: • An overview with totals: total_pages_scanned, pages_with_missing_title, pages_with_missing_description, pages_with_duplicate_titles (count of pages affected), pages_with_duplicate_descriptions (count of pages affected), pages_with_out_of_range_titles, pages_with_out_of_range_descriptions, and total_images_missing_alt. • A per-page summary listing the page path and issue tags found (e.g., missing_title, duplicate_title, title_length_short, description_length_long, image_missing_alt_count=number). • A section that lists duplicate groups for titles and for descriptions, showing the duplicated string and the file paths involved. - The recommendations file (output/meta_recommendations.csv) must include exactly these columns: file_path, current_title, current_description, recommended_title, recommended_description, rationale. Include one row for every page that has any title/description issue (missing, duplicate, or out of range). Do not include pages that have no title/description issues. - Content rules for recommendations: • recommended_title must be 30–65 characters (inclusive), include the page’s H1 text and the brand name "Valleys Explorer", and be unique across all pages. • recommended_description must be 110–160 characters (inclusive), include the word "Torfaen" at least once, and be unique across all pages. • The rationale should briefly state which issues (e.g., missing_title, duplicate_description) prompted the recommendation. - Do not modify the source files in input/site. Use only the provided files; no external websites or APIs. Save the two outputs exactly at: output/seo_audit.md and output/meta_recommendations.csv. All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
